title: Fire Concentration Doctrine
summary: Focus all weapons on single targets to maximize destruction rate.
details: Destroyed enemies cannot fight back. Concentrate all fire on one target until destroyed before switching. Exception: imminent threats to ship survival. Damaged enemies are priority - finishing them removes a threat and prevents repair. Resist the temptation to engage multiple targets simultaneously. A ship with five damaged enemies is worse off than one with four destroyed and one full-health.
annotations: Core tactical principle of naval combat.
Gunners may need reminded to stay on target.
